# Brainstorm Edge-Agent Eval Extensions

Task:

1. Inspect the current edge-agent and eval surfaces.
2. Brainstorm new eval extensions that push the edge agent outside its comfort zone.
3. Keep the ideas grounded in this repository's current agent and runner design.

This prompt is for brainstorming only. Do not submit an experiment unless the task explicitly switches to experiment creation.
